reviews.comment:
No me gustó las comodidades que dan a los que viajan en auto.  Sólo un estacionamiento a pleno sol sin sombra, tiene parque para niños y no tienen lugar para el descanso de los que viajamos con sillas y mesas como tienen muchas estaciones de servicio ACA y además había carteles que prohibían ir a comer debajo de un árbol.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the amenities they offer to those traveling by car. There's only one parking lot in full sun with no shade, a children's playground, and no place for those of us traveling to rest with chairs and tables like many ACA service stations have. Plus, there were signs prohibiting eating under a tree.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHOU5faWJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Se cortó la luz y siguieron con su generador propio. Desayuno y cochera incluidas, agua caliente para el mate sin costo. Restaurante muy abundante los canelones. Muy agradable y tranquilo. 👍

(Translated by Google)
The power went out, but they continued using their own generator. Breakfast and parking are included, and hot water for mate is free. The restaurant had a very generous portion of cannelloni. Very pleasant and quiet. 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHa3BqOEZBEAE
